palette.semantic_note: Use deep green, warm cream, and amber as the dominant launch system; exact pixel-level matching is not required.

logo.active_treatment: FlowForge folded-path app icon or compact wordmark

typography.headline: clean geometric sans-serif with calm spacing

required_zones: central or right planning-board UI hero zone
lower supporting line and CTA zone

allowed_directions: weekly task cards arranged in a focused board
minimal interface panels with one highlighted planning column
forbidden_active_roles: generic smartphone photo as main subject
required_components: cards, columns, or weekly lanes visible
focus state or current week cue visible

unauthorized_claims.rule: Do not add unsupported promises, discounts, guarantees, free offers, safety claims, or performance claims unless they appear in the approved_current copy.
forbidden_examples: ship every roadmap twice as fast

priority_notes: campaign_brief.md is authoritative; only approved_current copy may be used as active final copy.
